narrative:
Hamilton County has 606,153 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 30.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.0% D−R vs -0.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
